name: Knight
description: A stalwart defender with high health and strong defense. Slow but resilient.

ability.name: Shield Bash
ability.description: A powerful melee strike that stuns enemies briefly.

name: Mage
description: A nimble spellcaster with high jump and attack power. Fragile but powerful.

ability.name: Arcane Bolt
ability.description: Launches a ranged projectile that damages enemies on contact.

name: Rogue
description: A swift infiltrator with the fastest speed. Balanced stats with a dash ability.

ability.name: Shadow Dash
ability.description: A quick forward dash that grants brief invincibility.
